name: brainiac-manager
description: Host-mutating lifecycle skills for Brainiac: /brainiac-install (one-command host install + nightly registration + audit-key provisioning), /brainiac-update (refresh engine + workspaces + nightly after a marketplace update), /brainiac-uninstall (teardown). Separate from profile-a-kernel/profile-a-extras so daily-use skills never pull in host-mutating commands.
